Landing.metaTitle: Audience Suite — Your official creator app + audience CRM
Landing.metaDescription: Give your fans one official destination. Centralize your links, schedule, community and CRM — in a branded PWA that's always yours.
Landing.badge: Now in beta — free to start
Landing.heroSubtitle: Give your fans one official destination. Centralize your links, schedule, community and CRM — in a branded PWA that's always yours.
Landing.ctaNote: No credit card required · Takes 2 minutes to set up
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop sending fans to five different apps. Audience Suite gives you a single hub you own and control.
Landing.feature1Desc: One branded page for all your channels — YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Discord, WhatsApp and Telegram. No more link-in-bio third parties.
Landing.feature2Desc: Fans register in your app and give granular consent. You own the list — not the platform. LGPD/GDPR compliant from day one.
Landing.feature3Desc: Your fans install your app — your colors, your logo, your domain. Works on every device, no app store required.
Landing.feature4Desc: Publish your agenda and let fans add events to their calendars. Lives, meetups, releases — everything in one place.
Landing.feature5Desc: Reach your audience directly — new video, live alert, exclusive drop. No algorithm between you and your fans.
Landing.feature6Desc: Showcase your partnerships and digital products. Monetize your audience without leaving your hub.
Landing.howSubtitle: Three steps to your official creator hub.
Landing.step1Desc: Sign up, set your name and brand colors. Takes under 2 minutes.
Landing.step2Desc: Connect YouTube, Instagram, TikTok and any other official link.
Landing.step3Desc: Send your PWA link. Fans install it, join your CRM and never miss an update.
Landing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Create your official hub today — free during beta, no credit card needed.

Onboarding.title: Set up your creator hub
Onboarding.subtitle: A few quick steps to get your official app ready for your audience.
Onboarding.step1Subtitle: Tell your audience a bit about you.
Onboarding.step2Subtitle: Pick a primary color for your fan app.
Onboarding.step3Subtitle: Add one official channel so your fans know where to find you.
Onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell your fans who you are…
Onboarding.completeSetupDesc: Add a bio and your first social link so your fan app is ready to share.

Profile.title: Creator profile
Profile.subtitle: This information appears on your public fan app.
Profile.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell your fans who you are…

Links.title: Social links
Links.subtitle: Links appear on your fan app in the order listed.
Links.label: Label (optional)
Links.noLinks: No links yet. Add your first one below.

Events.title: Events
Events.subtitle: Create lives, meetups and launches. Published events appear in the fan app.
Events.noEvents: No events yet. Create your first one above.

Push.title: Push notifications
Push.subtitle: Send an instant message to all fans who enabled notifications.
Push.messagePlaceholder: e.g. I just published a new video. Check it out!
Push.urlNote: When clicking the notification, the fan will be redirected to this URL.
Push.disclaimer: The notification is delivered to all subscribers of your hub who accepted push. Fans without consent are not impacted.

Dashboard.snapshot: Here's a summary of your creator hub.
Dashboard.completeSetupDesc: Add a bio and your first social link so your fan app is ready to share.

Fans.title: Fans
Fans.subtitle: Everyone who joined your community.
Fans.noFans: No fans yet. Share your fan app link to get started.

Fan.noLinks: No links published yet. Check back soon.
